Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alaska"

Video.summary: Josh and Alex explore the SS United States; the world‘s largest artificial reef.
Video.title: "Wrecked Em'"

Video.summary: Establishing themselves just after the last Ice Age, the blacktail of Vancouver Island offers an important genetic population isolated from the mainland. To explore the local relationship with the species, its harvesting, conservation and history, Dan Cabela travels to the island.
Video.title: "The Blacktail of Vancouver Island"

Video.summary: Michael and Larken travel to South Carolina's Lowcountry for a massive barbecue charity event supporting children battling serious illness. After serving up smoke for a great cause, they spend an extra day in the marsh chasing redfish and speckled trout.
Video.title: "Holy Smokes"

Video.summary: Josh Dahlke scouts a block of mature hardwoods to get the bead on a resident flock of turkeys. Fresh off an out-of-state turkey hunt, his brother, Jake, hops in the saddle for a memorable (and chaotic) morning in the spring turkey woods.
Video.title: "Chaos Gobbler"

Video.summary: Josh and his wife Anna celebrate the first day of summer by taking their daughters out for a fun-filled day on the water.
Video.title: "Family Day"

Video.summary: In this episode of going coastal, Capt. Joshua Calhoon & Marcus Castro set out for epic Tarpon fishing. They got one boat side and then decided to go after giant mangrove snapper for hook & cook at Pepper’s!
Video.title: "Tarponist"

Video.summary: With only a limited amount of time, Capt. Jonathan Moss is in Pine Island Sound, on the hunt for monster migratory Tarpon.
Video.title: "Tarpon Time"

Video.summary: On this episode, we honor the life and legacy of Zumbrota Police officer Gary Schroeder while enjoying one of his favorite pastimes..Turkey Hunting! Gary's wife Kim, their three boys and nephew embark on a Turkey hunt in Central Minnesota to chase after some gobblers. In addition to honoring Gary and chasing Turkeys, we discuss the Invisible wounds that our servicemen and women face daily while protecting their communities and our freedoms. We also celebrate Johnstown Colorado Scheels Hometown Hero, Matt Hill.
Video.title: "Gary Schroeder Memorial Turkey Hunt"

Video.summary: On this episode of American Heroes Outdoors, We shift our focus to our Healthcare Heroes. Over the past 2+ years of the Covid 19 pandemic, Healthcare workers have gone above and beyond the call of duty to ensure they provide the best care to their communities even in the toughest of situations. Join us as we spend a day of Ice Fishing with Lock Jaw Guide service in Panfish paradise with our Healthcare Heroes and hear their stories of service and sacrifice
Video.title: "Healthcare Heroes"

Video.summary: 101 year old WWII U.S. Navy veteran George Hamilton recounts his amazing life in the service and as a post war semi-pro baseball player.
Video.title: "George Hamilton"

Video.summary: U.S. Air Force Lieutenant Colonel Todd Berge recounts his life as a fighter pilot and B2 Stealth Bomber pilot/instructor.
Video.title: "Todd Berge"

Video.summary: Join WoodHaven's Mike Pentecost as he kicks off his Alabama turkey season - these mountain birds are tough to hunt!
Video.title: "KILLIN TREE"

Video.summary: A heaven sent early morning turkey hunt with Colten and Mark Scroggins. The Apex Turkey Ninja TSS will make you a believer in killing turkeys with a .410!
Video.title: "HELP FROM ABOVE"

Video.summary: Colten Scroggins and the whole family return to the blind to see if they can call one of the other gobblers back in to their setup. A family that hunts together stays together!
Video.title: "GIGGLES & GOBBLES"

Video.summary: Mike and Jacob are hunting an old turkey "Meanie" they have some history with on public land. Mike demos the WoodHaven box call clip.
Video.title: "CALLING A HUNG UP TOM!"

Video.summary: Jacob Pentecost and Easton Thompson head to Illinois for the youth hunting season. With hot weather and slow deer movement, the hunt proves to be a challenge. After days of patience and persistence, Jacob finally gets the opportunity to fill his tag!
Video.title: "Slow Start, Big Finish!"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike navigates South Carolina’s breathtaking marsh, seizing a brief window when the seasonal high tide floods the grass, bringing incredible fishing.
Video.title: "Flood Tide"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike joins a local legend in the waters of Amelia Island, exploring its rich fishery and targeting redfish, trout, and more in this coastal gem.
Video.title: "Amelia Angler"

Video.summary: Josh heads offshore for the first day of red snapper season with his friend Joe Koenraad.
Video.title: "Opening Day"

Video.summary: When Plan A and Plan B don't go as planned, Destin always has a way of bailing you out.
Video.title: "Beach Bros"

Video.summary: The bite’s dead during a neap tide, but Josh and Isaiah don’t back down. Watch them adapt, pivot, and turn a tough day into a hard-earned win. It’s not luck—it’s hustle.
Video.title: "Neap tide Hustle"

Video.summary: Join CA and Captain Brian hilton head, SC where the Low-country GTs offer a thrilling challenge like no other. These underrated giants fight harder than anything that swims, pushing your tackle to the limits.
Video.title: "Lowcountry GT"

Video.summary: CA and Cody venture into the tranquil waters of Charlotte Harbor's estuary. While the anticipation of a snook's elusive strike fills the air a sudden tug, and a screaming reels keep them coming back for more year after year.
Video.title: "Mr. Waterkeeper"

Video.summary: Join CA as he guides father and son team Justin and Kelly in the Louisiana marsh. Join them on their first trip, an unforgettable adventure to the land of giants.
Video.title: "Like Father Like Son"

Video.summary: CA and longtime fishing buddy Dave Denkert get together for a Flamingo Slam.
Video.title: "Denk"

Video.summary: Rooted in history, Apalachicola, Florida, is where Capt. Jonathan Moss finds himself today, scouting the marsh for hungry backcountry dwellers.
Video.title: "Operation Apalach"

Video.summary: The tide is right for Capt. Jonathan Moss to chase that Northeast Florida slam.
Video.title: "First Coast Fishing"

Video.summary: Capt. Jonathan Moss is fishing in the Northern Indian River Lagoon with DOA Lures Founder, Capt. Mark Nichols.
Video.title: "Space Coast Slam"

Video.summary: We kick off Season 2 in Tennessee where we stop in Nashville, Townsend, and Johnson City!!
Video.title: "Traveling Over 2,000 Miles to Fish HERE!"

Video.summary: This episode we make our way through the mountains of western North Carolina, where we stop in Asheville and Cashiers!!
Video.title: "Dry Fly Fishing HEAVEN (Wild Trout)"

Video.summary: Famous for its Mayan ruins, the Yucatan in Mexico is home to a diverse array of wildlife. After years of over-harvesting and exploitation, regulated hunting is helping to conserve large areas of this fragile ecosystem. Dan Cabela travels to the region to find out more.
Video.title: "Into the Yucatán"

Video.summary: Few moments in turkey hunting are better than watching a longbeard pitch down at first light. In this episode of Turkey POSSE, the crew sets up on roosted birds in Wisconsin and the action unfolds fast. At flydown, two fired-up gobblers commit to the setup, giving us an unforgettable sunrise in the spring turkey woods. Roosted birds don’t always cooperate — but when they do, it’s pure magic. If you love spring turkey hunting, hard gobbling longbeards, and classic flydown action, this is the kind of hunt that keeps us coming back every season.
Video.title: "Wisconsin Turkey Hunting: Two Longbeards at Flydown"

Image.alt: "Wisconsin Turkey Hunting: Two Longbeards at Flydown"
"Wisconsin Turkey Hunting: Two Longbeards at Flydown"
"Wisconsin Turkey Hunting: Two Longbeards at Flydown"

Video.summary: This passion project of Willi’s came about after filming the Opening of Pure Hunting’s TV series for a couple of years. There was quite a bit of filming showcasing him working out and he decided to utilize the footage for a larger project. “My Why” is a short film of his why for working out and showcasing a few hunts where his physical fitness came into play.
Video.title: "My Why"

Video.summary: Join Gavin as he heads afield in Pennsylvania to chase gobblers. He finds himself in the middle of a perfect off the roost hunt that was captured beautifully.
Video.title: The - "The PERFECT Turkey Hunt | Off The ROOST in Pennsylvania"

Image.alt: The - "The PERFECT Turkey Hunt | Off The ROOST in Pennsylvania"
The - "The PERFECT Turkey Hunt | Off The ROOST in Pennsylvania"
The - "The PERFECT Turkey Hunt | Off The ROOST in Pennsylvania"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson sets his sights on a Free-Range New Zealand Red Stag, but it doesn't come easy. Dense fog, steep terrain, and thick vegetation make finding a mature stag no easy task. Watch as Mark Peterson and his guide cover the gorgeous New Zealand landscape in search of one of the most sought-after big game animals on the South Island of New - Zealand. On this hunt, Mark was unable to get his firearms import permit in time to take his Gunwerks rifle, so he'd again have to borrow from his guide.
Video.title: "The Stag"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson is in Ethiopia hunting Mountain Nyala. After the first two days, Mark has taken a Menelik’s Bushbuck and a Colobus Monkey but no Mountain Nyala. Finally, on Day 3 the hunting party receives the green light from the military to hunt in the area they wanted. It's time to put the Gunwerks rifle to the test.
Video.title: "Mountain Nyala and Bohor Reedbuck - Ethiopia: Part Two"

Image.alt: "Mountain Nyala and Bohor Reedbuck - Ethiopia: Part Two"
"Mountain Nyala and Bohor Reedbuck - Ethiopia: Part Two"
"Mountain Nyala and Bohor Reedbuck - Ethiopia: Part Two"

Video.summary: Join Mark Peterson as he embarks on a thrilling hunt in Croatia for the Eurasian Brown Bear. Experience the beauty of the Croatian wilderness and witness the skill and precision required for a successful hunt. Follow along as Mark faces all the challenges dealing with wind and a big bear that is extremely smart, making it very difficult to harvest this amazing animal. Don’t miss this exciting hunting adventure with Mark Peterson in Croatia!
Video.title: "Hunting Giant Eurasian Brown Bear in Croatia"

Image.alt: "Hunting Giant Eurasian Brown Bear in Croatia"
"Hunting Giant Eurasian Brown Bear in Croatia"
"Hunting Giant Eurasian Brown Bear in Croatia"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff venture deep into Maine’s backcountry with their buddy Chuck, ice fishing remote lakes only reachable by snowmobile. Their journey ends at the legendary “ghost trains,” a pair of abandoned locomotives that now rest as silent monuments to a forgotten logging era.
Video.title: "The Maine Ghost Trains"

Video.summary: Kyle explores the Great Lakes on his Sea-Doo in search of walleye and lake trout.
Video.title: "Great Lakes Extreme Fishing"

Video.summary: Kyle Green and his buddy Jeremy set out on a buffalo hunt in the great state of Oklahoma. Along the way they learn about the true past and potential future of the American Buffalo from several interesting people with different perspectives.
Video.title: "Bison Bison Bison"

Video.summary: Kyle Green heads to Yankton, South Dakota to learn about the history of the Missouri river and the people who count on the river for sustenance. The invasive carp are set to destroy this rich ecosystem and Kyle aims to stop this fish with his best weapon, a great recipe.
Video.title: "Invasive Carp Disaster"

Video.summary: Kyle Green meets up with his friends at the National Wild Turkey Federation to dive into turkey conservation, and hunt the largest subspecies of wild turkey. Kyle finishes off this episode with his most favorite wild game recipe, boneless wild turkey wings.
Video.title: "The Great Eastern Turkey"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor join Captain Bryson Shaaber to fish the channels around Key West targeting big spring tarpon with live pinfish.
Video.title: "Tarpon in the Key West Channels"

Video.summary: Trenton and Rex link up with Gehrig Dieter and Anthony Sherman from the Kansas City Chiefs. While filling the boat with crappie they got to learn about the guys and their careers in the NFL.
Video.title: "Crappie Kingdom"

Video.summary: New. York. City. That’s where our host Josh Rosen kicks off his journey in Episode 4—and where he lived for 16 years and started up the surf-centric apparel brand, Saturdays NYC. Back in his old stomping grounds, Josh first meets up with the award-winning chef and Mumbai native, Chintan Pandya, currently blowing up the New York food scene with his unapologetic and authentic Indian cuisine (pro tip: try the goat brains). Next, Josh travels through the boroughs, heads upstate, and along the coast to source local ingredients—from sake brewers and pig farmers to catching fresh lobster just 100 miles from Wall Street. As always the adventure will end with a feast, right back in Chintan’s kitchen.
Video.title: DIRT - "Exploring New York City's Hidden Culinary Gems: Cooking Goat Brains, Lobster & MORE"

Image.alt: DIRT - "Exploring New York City's Hidden Culinary Gems: Cooking Goat Brains, Lobster & MORE"
DIRT - "Exploring New York City's Hidden Culinary Gems: Cooking Goat Brains, Lobster & MORE"
DIRT - "Exploring New York City's Hidden Culinary Gems: Cooking Goat Brains, Lobster & MORE"

Video.summary: Michael continues the family tradition of fish stew and gathering, with hopes that Larkin will pass on the same traditions.
Video.title: "Family Recipe"

Video.summary: On this show we will explore the crystal-clear waters of Islamorada to experience all this area has to offer. We will highlight the critical roll sharks play in our eco system and what is being done to protect them.
Video.title: "Islamorada"

Video.summary: From battling towering 12-foot waves in the Gulf of Alaska, to reeling in colossal 200 lb. halibut, they discover firsthand the rugged beauty of America's 49th state. This episode highlights Lindell Yachts as a top builder of rugged offshore sportfishing yachts, as well as Radon Boats as great pilothouse fishing and guide boats.
Video.title: "Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 1"

Image.alt: "Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 1"
"Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 1"
"Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 1"

Video.summary: After a long winter, Pete Osterman is eager to knock down his Minnesota gobbler with Josh Dahlke for their annual opening-week tradition. But like many turkey hunts, the POSSE gets the runaround at fly-down and end up grinding all day for an opportunity.
Video.title: "Dawn to Dusk Gobbler"

Video.summary: Hunting Wisconsin gobblers into the final weeks of May comes with its challenges. Birds have faced a full season of hunting pressure, and they’re always a moment away from flipping the switch into summer patterns. But those last few eager longbeards make it worth the grind. In this episode of the Turkey POSSE, Grant Hudgens tags his first ever out-of-state strutter and becomes a card-carrying member of the Turkey POSSE.
Video.title: "Late-Season Gobblers in Wisconsin"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson continues his quest on the Hearst Ranch in California. Next up on the list, California Aoudad. These Aoudad were introduced to the ranch in the early 1920s and have thrived ever since.
Video.title: "Chasing Giant Aoudad In California"

Video.summary: On this trip, Mark finds himself in Eastern Colorado looking for a big mature Mule Deer. Eastern Colorado is known for some of the best spot and stalk Mule Deer hunting in the US. With the rut in full swing, seeing bucks isn't usually a problem. But getting in range of a big mature buck can be a challenge. Mark spots the mature deer he wants to pursue and spends all of his time trying to get.
Video.title: "Eastern Colorado Muleys"

Video.summary: Mark's quest for the South America Waterfowl Slam has now taken him to Peru where he finds a surprising density of Cinnamon Teal. Although he already checked this species off the list in Argentina, his first hunt in Peru proves to be one of the best Cinnamon Teal shoots of his life. This is only the first afternoon and there are 5 days left to hunt the remaining 7 species.
Video.title: "Cinnamon Teal Everywhere- First Hunt In Peru | , South American Waterfowl Slam"

Image.alt: "Cinnamon Teal Everywhere- First Hunt In Peru | , South American Waterfowl Slam"
"Cinnamon Teal Everywhere- First Hunt In Peru | , South American Waterfowl Slam"
"Cinnamon Teal Everywhere- First Hunt In Peru | , South American Waterfowl Slam"

Video.summary: WoodHaven’s Josh Anderson heads to the Western Plains of Kansas in pursuit of a mature whitetail buck. Because of the wide open terrain, a decoy and blind calling can be very affective because of the visibility. After a few well-timed grunts on the Intimidator grunt call, a shooter buck shows up right at the base of the tree!
Video.title: "Kansas Buck Appears Out of Nowhere"

Video.summary: In Missouri, we join Avery Epperson on the home farm with one goal in mind—catching up with a legendary buck known as Old Monroe. It doesn’t take long before the hunt heats up as the crew spots their target and works to grunt him into bow range. Hunting over a lush green plot on the home farm, Avery gets the chance every whitetail hunter dreams of.
Video.title: "Old Monroe"

Video.summary: After years of chasing one of the oldest and most elusive bucks he's ever encountered, Phillip Vanderpool uses the WoodHaven Initmidator grunt call to finally gets his shot at Tinman, a legendary 10.5-year-old buck in Kansas.
Video.title: "Hunting a 10 1/2 YEAR OLD BUCK"

Video.summary: This 10 gauge doesn't mess around! Greg Keeton was a well deserved Prostaffer of the Year for WoodHaven. He joins Mark Scroggins and Tony Doty in Nebraska to hunt Merriam's and Rios. Greg has one of the very first Real Hen box calls and guess what, she still sings a pretty turkey tune!
Video.title: "IF OLD CALLS COULD TALK"

Video.summary: Welcome to Season 2 of Turkey Ninja presented by WoodHaven! It's opening day of youth season in Alabama and Mike and Jacob are ready to work on some longbeards! Right off the roost turkeys are in sight and put on quite a show for Jacob who is trying to punch a tag on his 39th "Shrutter"!
Video.title: "OPENING DAY 'SHRUTTER"

Video.summary: Willi got an invitation on a late season whitetail hunt in Oklahoma. He joins Tom Petry for a rifle hunt on a property he has no history with, but it did have some good deer and lots of wild horses.
Video.title: "Okie Horse Pasture Buck"
